programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Goumba Johnny Sialiano: Comedy in COVID
programme.desc: Goumba Johnny Sialino recaps the chaos and comedy of quarantine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Landry's energy is contagious. Coming to the Dry Bar stage with a fresh, bold take on common tropes, he describes the difference between first-class passengers and everyone else a DUI and an IUD and Cracker Barrel versus any yard sale.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: A one-of-a-kind delivery accompanied by impeccable timing and imaginative comedy angles has led DAVE DUGAN down the path to NATIONAL TV APPEARANCES and to RAVE REVIEWS from corporate event planners.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Helene brings honesty to the stage that helps everyone relax-- and laugh at the joys and pains of aging, being a married mother of two and all that the generation gap brings!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Have you ever, as an adult, been bullied by a healthcare professional or popular middle school girl? Andrew has. The comedy of Andrew Hobbs encapsulates the bizarre awkwardness of belated maturity and his attempts to appear in control. Andrew will have you rolling with laughter as he twists a narrative of humor and heart from his own life experiences and observations. His comedy has been featured in comedy festivals across the country. He has been perfecting his craft since childhood and throughout adulthood.

programme.title: Ron Ruhman
programme.desc: Ron has been called a “High Energy Seinfeld”. He brings a very energetic style to the stage as he shares his interesting slant on day-to-day life in an act that is clean, smart, and very entertaining.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Paul was raised as a sports fanatic in the tiny town of Owego, in upstate New York. After four years of playing college basketball, somehow he graduated. Aside from playing in the NBA, his dream job was to talk about sports for a living. Paul then moved to California after landing a television sports anchor job but found out quickly that he was “too much of a smart-ass” for TV news. After he was fired, Paul took his unique sense of humor to comedy club stages all over the country. In 2005, Paul was selected to perform at the HBO Comedy Festival in Las Vegas. Morrissey has also been a finalist in several national comedy competitions including Wendy's Comedy Challenge, Comedy Central's Open Mic Fight and Maxim's Real Men of Comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Jonnie W: Not My Cup of Tea
programme.desc: Jonnie W addresses the Tennessee-born stereotype. Whether or not he matches up to it, his voiced inner monologue is sure to leave you on his side when it comes to new country radio, double decker grave plots, and the difference between fish and beef.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Burton delivers his comedy with high energy, great storytelling, and hilarious facial expressions. Mike started his stand-up comedy career in 1996 first performing in the local clubs in NYC, then gaining nationwide popularity. He has been on TV shows, independent feature films, and commercials for HP and Modells. Mike has also performed in daytime shows: Rachel Ray, The Chew, and ABC's The Revolution.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Half-Persian and raised in a religious family, K-Von's comedy unites sharp cultural riffs with clean delivery. In this special he takes on political correctness, cyber bullying, and the utility of cargo pants.

programme.title: Tim Allen ReWires America
programme.desc: In his 1991 special, we see the Tim Allen we grew to love. He grunts, he burps, he soups up his lawnmower and he's proud of it, dammit!

programme.title: Tim Allen Men Are Pigs
programme.desc: In this special from 1990, Tim Allen proves men are pigs as he discusses family and the differences between women and men.

programme.title: Gallagher An Uncensored Evening
programme.desc: Join Gallagher for his 1st TV special from 1980, complete with candy bar treats and a Sledge-O-Matic routine for which the audience was ill prepared.

programme.title: Gallagher Mad As Hell
programme.desc: Gallagher's mad as hell but he never shows it, because he's cool as well.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham Very Special Christmas Special
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham's first holiday special is a one-of-a-kind live event unlike any Yuletide celebration youve ever seen!

programme.title: Jeff Dunham Minding The Monsters
programme.desc: An all-new original live comedy event that is so funny, it's scary!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their live comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 1960's fantasy classic! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for RiffTrax Live Jack The Giant Killer!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the future of fashion. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Fashion Horizons!

programme.title: Rifftrax: Supersonic Man
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this low-budget superhero classic. Assume a rigid, very uncomfortable looking flying stance and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Supersonic Man!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Deadly Prey is the kind of budget badassery you've come to expect from the guy who donned a mesh belly shirt to play David Carradine's son in Future Zone. Align your desk grenades properly, then join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for 80s action cheese at its ripest.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to the educational short Families: Earning And Spending! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill and spend a little well-earned time with Families: Earning and Spending!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's horror classic about a lovely woman attracted to beasts.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: A hitman tries to retire, but a beautiful thief may change his plans.

programme.title: Mechanic Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop [Jason Statham] returns as the Mechanic in the sequel to the 2011 action-thiller. When the deceitful actions of a cunning but beautiful woman [Jessica Alba] force him to return to the life he left behind, Bishop's life is once again in danger as he has to complete an impossible list of assassinations of the most dangerous men in the world.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-F.B.I. Agent (Tommy Lee Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program (Morgan Freeman) have to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: In this fantastical action film, martial arts legend Jackie Chan stars as a police inspector tracking down a deranged villain who is out to kidnap his daughter.

programme.title: Villains
programme.desc: After a pair of amateur criminals break into a suburban home, they stumble upon a dark secret that two sadistic homeowners will do anything to keep from getting out.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: An Oscar-nominated drama set in early 1900s Vienna. An illusionist (Edward Norton, "Fight Club") uses his powers to charm an engaged aristocrat (Jessica Biel, "Next"). With Rufus Sewell and Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's I Can Do Bad All By Myself
programme.desc: An uplifting drama infused with music and Tyler Perry's trademark mixture of laughter and heart, I CAN DO BAD ALL BY MYSELF features dramatic and musical performances by Gladys Knight, Marvin Winans and Mary J. Blige.

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Villains
programme.desc: After a pair of amateur criminals break into a suburban home, they stumble upon a dark secret that two sadistic homeowners will do anything to keep from getting out.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: An Oscar-nominated drama set in early 1900s Vienna. An illusionist (Edward Norton, "Fight Club") uses his powers to charm an engaged aristocrat (Jessica Biel, "Next"). With Rufus Sewell and Paul Giamatti.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: The Love Gala
programme.desc: When Kate is given the job of planning her mom's Garden Gala, she must compromise with the head of the Botanical Garden. Can she juggle this combative relationship and please her mom?

programme.title: The Wedding Chapel
programme.desc: Uninspired and newly single painter Sara is down on her luck and wants nothing more than to get away from her problems. When she decides to take a trip to visit her mom,she becomes involved in the efforts to save a local church which is in danger of being closed down. Determined to help preserve the historic building,Sara embarks on a mission that not only gives her a new outlook on life,but enables her mother to rekindle a long lost love from her past...a story about love,forgiveness and embracing new beginnings.

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: After an L.A. ad-exec burns out at work and gets bequeathed a South Carolina home, she moves cross-country with her two daughters to start fresh, regain her bearings, and repair the fractured relationship with her older daughter.

programme.title: Signs of Your Heart
programme.desc: Allie is a single mother to her fun-loving deaf son Finn. When she finds an unlikely new tenant in handsome, free-spirited Ronan, Allie might just find her happily ever after?

programme.title: The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Story of Irena Sendler, who saved the lives of nearly 2,500 Jewish children.

programme.title: In From the Night
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. A writer forms a compassionate bond with her nephew.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.title: A Gift of Miracles
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Darcy finds a list of belongings her estranged mother intended to give to away.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: After a bitter breakup, Anna goes to work at a massage parlor.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Cellmate Secrets is an unfiltered perspective on well-known true-crime stories. Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship.

programme.title: Dead On Campus
programme.desc: College should have been the best time of Natalie's life.

programme.title: Sins in the Suburbs
programme.desc: As news of a local serial killer begins to spread, Heather questions a neighbor.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: After a bitter breakup, Anna goes to work at a massage parlor.

programme.title: Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: It's up to police chief Judy Hammer and her deputy to uncover the serial killer terrorizing Charlotte, NC.

programme.title: Good Morning, Killer
programme.desc: An FBI agent begins to notice a pattern in a kidnapping case. A new lead leaves her questioning her theory.

programme.title: Beyond a Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: Remake of the 1956 film noir film in which a writer's plan to expose a corrupt DA takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Mud
programme.desc: Two boys discover a desperado on the run. After hearing his incredible tale, they decide to help him.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: In hopes of wooing a girl, Tristan promises to bring her a falling star. He soon discovers the star is actually a celestial beauty named Yvaine. When an old witch, Lamia attempts to steal Yvaine?s youth, Tristan must protect her.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: A working-class African-American father tries to raise his family in the 1950s

programme.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi
programme.desc: The gripping true story of six elite ex-military operators assigned to protect the CIA

programme.title: The Quiet American
programme.desc: An old British reporter vies with a young U.S. doctor for the affections of a beautiful Vietnamese woman.

programme.title: The Duellists
programme.desc: Two officers in Napoleon's army who violently confront each other in a series of duels.

programme.title: The Squeeze
programme.desc: A down-and-out artist and a no-nonsense bill collector team up to solve a murder and foil a high-stakes scam.

programme.title: Cops And Robbersons
programme.desc: A suburban family's life is turned upside down when their home is used to stake out the mobster next door.

programme.title: Nadine
programme.desc: Nadine and Vernon Hightower: The cops want her, the killers want him, they want a divorce. Isn't love grand?

programme.title: Things Change (1988)
programme.desc: A small-time mobster and an old shoeshine man become embroiled in a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Gilda
programme.desc: A crooked gambler, a casino owner, and his unfaithful wife are caught up in a steamy, and deadly -- love triangle.

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: It is 1942 and Norway is under the thumb of the Nazis. In a Norwegian factory, Nazis are producing "heavy water," an essential element in the production of atomic weapons. The leader of the Norwegian underground is enlisted by British intelligence to aid in destroying the factory.

programme.title: Marooned
programme.desc: Three American astronauts are stranded in space when their retros won't fire.

programme.title: Hatari
programme.desc: Director Howard Hawks reteams with John Wayne, who heads a group of highly skilled professional game hunters in Africa. Only they don't use bullets – they capture the ferocious big game with strong rope and cameras for zoos and circus attractions.

programme.title: The Fighting Seabees
programme.desc: The construction foreman of a fighting work battalion to be stationed near Japanese lines in the Pacific and a naval commander colleague compete in Washington for a journalist, while preparing to engage the enemy in a massive assault.

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He's a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Fun in Acapulco
programme.desc: Elvis heads south of the border, where he's fired as a boat hand, hired as a lifeguard and singer, admired by local beauties and inspired to jump off a 136-foot cliff. Put another way: he overcomes a fear of heights in spectacular fashion.

programme.title: Trailers Reloaded

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Glenn Miller Story

programme.title: The Killers
programme.desc: An insurance investigator pieces together the events that led up to a boxer's murder.

programme.title: Introducing Jodea
programme.desc: A down and out unemployed actress has her fortunes change when a world famous movie director drives into the back of her car.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: The story of a teenage boy who deals with the ups and downs of being lethally attractive. Starring Brandon Flynn, Julia Goldani, and Ki Hong Lee.

programme.title: Addicted to Fresno
programme.desc: Martha (Natasha Lyonne) is a lonely but stoic lesbian whose sister Shannon (Judy Greer), a sex addict with no impulse control, ends up back in Fresno.

programme.title: Bad Therapy
programme.desc: Bob and Susan see a marriage counselor, Judy Small, to improve their relationship. However, Judy Small's dark impulses end up bringing Bob and Susan's marriage to the breaking point. Starring Alicia Silverstone and Rob Corddry.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: MyTime Movie Network

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla's art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef.

programme.title: Heart of the Manor
programme.desc: Real-estate agent Lisa competes with developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's manor.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: A Family Engagement
programme.desc: Afraid to tell her family she's been dumped, Hillary hires an actor to play her fiancé during a four-day Thanksgiving weekend at her parents' house.

programme.title: Get to the Heart: The Barbara Mandrell Story
programme.desc: Biography of country music star Barbara Mandrell looks at her early career, and follows her career through the tragic auto accident in 1984. Mandrell portrays herself in her later life, and Maureen McCormick offers a good portrayal of the younger Mandrell.

programme.title: Love Again
programme.desc: A distant father (Kevin Sorbo) and losing his girlfriend to his best friend (Ben Davies) leads Nathan (Jason Burkey) on a journey of rediscovery.

programme.title: For Horowitz
programme.desc: Failed pianist Ji-soo discovers a gifted boy and becomes his teacher and guardian for a piano competition.

programme.title: Welcome To The Guesthouse
programme.desc: Jun-geun keeps failing at job seeking in cold job market. One day, He finds hope through surfing by the beach.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: One day, a border guard is killed by a rifle bullet in the demilitarized zone between North and South Korea.

programme.title: Luck-key
programme.desc: An assassin falls in a sauna and gets amnesia. His life changes as his locker key changes with an actor.

programme.title: SistAhood
programme.desc: Jordyn Dixon returns home to the city of Augusta to reunite with loved ones, but she quickly finds out that things are not the same as she left them years ago. This story follows Jordyn and her circle of friends, who are each on different walks of life in their professions and relationships, but each of their stories and paths are intertwined as each woman must deal with situations in their individual lives that could disrupt their bonds with one another.

programme.title: Preaching to The Pastor
programme.desc: PREACHING TO THE PASTOR is a musical comedy about the controversy going on at High And Mighty Missionary Baptist Church. The Pastor has a dark secret that may cost him his title and his ministry. In the end, everyone needs to be preached to, including the Pastor.

programme.title: Pastor Thorne: Lust of the Flesh
programme.desc: Pastor Jacob Thorne has a prominent church and a stellar reputation in his city however, as his fame continues to grow, it is also blinding him causing him to lose focus on what really matters: his family. However, once his son blows into town, his life begins to go on an unexpected whirlwind that could cause his life to take an unwanted spiral downhill.

programme.title: Non-Disclosure
programme.desc: A new comer to a company climbs the corporate ladder very quickly, but pays a cost behind closed doors to get there.

programme.title: No Love Lost
programme.desc: After finalizing their divorce Noah and Moriah find themselves going from lovers to roommates. Moriah has moved on already and began dating her co-worker Anthony, 6 months before the divorce was final. Noah is still in love with her but find himself falling for a waitress named Rochelle. Rochelle, with the help of his best friend Quincy, give Noah the motivation to stand up to Moriah in situations where he would be meek to say the least. Noah and Quincy also find themselves battling women issues, Quincy with his boss, Yvette, of which he's having a sexual relationship with and Noah who battles Moriah's new man, Anthony, and Rochelle's old one, Casey.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: Magic tricks can't compete with rock 'n' roll in the 1950s, so a French illusionist (Jean-Claude Donda) finds himself touring Scotland's shabby pubs and run-down restaurants. But things brighten for him when he meets Alice (Eilidh Rankin), a girl who believes his powers are real. Together they travel to Edinburgh for a performance, but he doesn't have the heart to reveal that his feats are merely tricks, and risks financial ruin by giving her gifts supplied by his "magic."

programme.title: A Lover Betrayed
programme.desc: Inspired by true events. A one-night romance with a handsome soldier turns Tess Ford's life upside down as his attraction to her becomes a frightening obsession.

programme.title: The Twilight of the Golds

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.desc: Amores que Engañan - Talento Robado: Elisa es un ama de casa que ha dedicado gran parte de su vida a su familia. Hasta que, cansada del maltrato de su marido, decide revelar un gran secreto.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: El Talismán - Disparo: Antonio enloqueció. Toma un arma y le dispara a Pedro y se dirige hacia el casamiento que se estaba realizando en el Talismán.

programme.title: Eva Luna
programme.desc: Eva Luna - Laurita Desaparecida: Daniel le pregunta a Adrian si sabe algo acerca de su hija y él le dice que no sabe nada de ella. Eva acompaña a Daniel a hacer la denuncia.

programme.title: La Clínica
programme.desc: La Clínica - Beso Errado: Miguel le da un beso a la que cree que es Maripili, pero se da cuenta que le dio el beso a su hermana gemela Maripili.

programme.title: Secretos de Villanas
programme.desc: Secretos de Villanas - S02E05 - ¡Qué Amistades, Cariño!: Mientras las Villanas toman clases de tenis y organizan un picnic, el tema de la bebida provoca que la tensión entre Gaby y Cynthia aumente.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Intrigas dolorosas
programme.desc: Durante una cena con Hugo y Alejandro, Florencia confiesa que vio a Mili besando a su esposo. Andrea y Karla le hacen creer a Valeria que Luciana sabe de su noviazgo con Rocky. Hugo y Alejandro vuelven a enfrentarse por el amor de Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Trágica muerte
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Necesitas ayuda
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Problemas familiares
programme.desc: Sofía le reclama a Rodrigo por alejar a su familia por culpa de Gaviota, él le exige no entrometerse en su vida. Alonso hace un brindis por Gaviota y asegura que es una mujer increíble, ella se pone nerviosa al escuchar sus palabras.

programme.title: Teresa: Falsa amistad
programme.desc: A Mayra se le rompe el corazón al descubrir que Rubén y Genoveva son amantes. Teresa engaña a Fernando diciéndole que está comenzando a enamorarse de él.

programme.title: Rubí: Un nuevo proyecto
programme.desc: Alejandro llega a Cancún y se encuentra con su hermana Sofía y sus papás Don Genaro se enfurece al ver que Luis y Sofía juntos y cree que puede ser descubierto.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre
programme.desc: Sofía le dice a Demián que no puede corresponder su amor, pero él está dispuesto a pelear por ella. Antes de irse del pueblo, Rosario decide acompañar a Armando para abrir la caja fuerte de Fernando. Juan busca a Sofía, pero ella lo rechaza.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Nandito duda de que María lo haya querido salvar y piensa que es una asesina. Soraya confronta a María en la cárcel para provocarla y acusarla de haberla querido matar también. María le reprocha a Luis Fernando su infidelidad.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: La compañera de celda de María resulta ser Penélope, quien empieza a hacerle la vida miserable. Soraya trata de convencer a Luis Fernando que María y Nandito solo querían hacerle daño.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina planea hacer que Mística sea la nueva novia de Jorge Luis. Mística aprovechará la fiesta de Jorge Luis para poder reconquistarlo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio conoce a su hija y está decidido a ayudar a Marimar Arturo le confiesa a su mamá y a su hermana que se va a casar.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio descubre que Bella es Marimar y le exige una explicación, pues es el padre de la hija de ella. Bella le dice al gobernador que se casará con él.

programme.title: Alborada: Ayuda aceptada
programme.desc: Luis le pregunta a Hipólita si tuvo algún hijo fuera de matrimonio y ella sospecha que es el padre de su hijo. Además, ella decide aceptar la ayuda de Diego.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana enfurece al saber que Valentina ha decidido casarse con José Miguel. José Miguel idea un plan para evitar que Valentina piense que se casa con ella solo por interés. Valentina le dice a Benita por qué se enamoró de José Miguel.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Felipe le confiesa a Sandra el inmenso amor que siente por ella. Leonor le hace creer a José Miguel que apoya su decisión de casarse con Valentina. Horacio idea un plan para separar a Sandra de Felipe.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Enriqueta enfurece al saber que Sandra está saliendo con Felipe. Leonor lleva a cabo sus planes para que Valentina dude del amor que José Miguel siente por ella.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina idea un plan para saber el pasado de José Miguel. Sandra sufre al saber que su madre jamás aceptará su relación con Felipe. Isabel decide alejarse de Federico para evitar malentendidos.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy se cae por las escaleras y queda inconsciente. Ana Julia culpa a Candelaria del accidente, pero Candelaria también la acusa. Patricio se siente mal por la discusión y cae inconsciente.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.sub-title: Ni el tiempo ni la distancia
programme.desc: Patricio sufre una pequeña embolia y pierde la movilidad de un brazo. Por otro lado, Ana Julia se roba el alhajero con las flores de Marichuy.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: El Dr. Durán invita a Juan Miguel a trabajar con él. Cande encuentra el joyero de Marichuy en la basura. Patricio le exige a Marichuy que se olvide de Juan Miguel. Ana Julia se lleva a Mayita sin avisar, dejando a todos muy angustiados.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Problemas de dinero
programme.desc: Teresa le da información a Leonardo sobre los 5 millones de pesos. Leonardo investiga y confronta a José Luis sobre el dinero. Majo decide atrapar ella sola a Darío.

programme.title: La Gata: Terrible accidente
programme.desc: Esmeralda es atropellada por un hombre que le ofrece trabajo en su empresa. Por otro lado, Virginia le regala cosas a "Centavito" y Chayo. Además, Pablo le pide casamiento a Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Celos dañinos
programme.desc: Esteban le confiesa a Rocío el gran interés que siente por ella. Efraín se molesta al saber que Consuelo es ahora novia de Hugo. Cynthia intenta suicidarse al pensar que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Espía en la oficina
programme.desc: Bruno piensa utilizar a Katia como espía en la oficina de Alex. Victoria comienza a enamorarse de Fernando. Paula consigue quedarse en casa de Alex. Alex visita a Meche y le pregunta sobre Pedro, pero ella niega conocerlo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Un bebé para Florencia
programme.desc: Paloma sufre al saber que Gael se casará con Elisa. Sabrina le confiesa a Elisa que Paolo la había enamorado para conseguirle un bebé a Florencia.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Sacrificio de amor
programme.desc: Valentina le pide a José Miguel que evite encontrarse con Rosendo. Ivana se alegra al saber que, gracias a Toledo, Isabel podría quedar en libertad.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Instinto
programme.desc: Verónica llama a casa de Piedad y ella comienza a sospechar que Carlos Daniel siente algo por ella, pues él se emociona con la llamada. Estefanía disfruta de su nueva vida con Willy y su futuro bebé.

programme.title: El manantial: Declaración de guerra
programme.desc: Alfonsina descubre la puesta en escena de Gilberto en complicidad con Bárbara y habla con ella. Luego, ella tiene una cita.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: Piloto de carreras
programme.desc: Dada su experiencia como chofer de microbuses, ahora que es rico, Vítor decide convertirse en piloto de carreras y, con Albertano, crea la escudería "Los Guapos".

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Los niños del barrio apedrean a Ofertín con Albertano dentro. El chino tiene una fiesta y doña Lucha invita a Nayeli. María va a un centro nocturno con sus amigas pero sus acompañantes las dejan con la cuenta.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: Rosa cambia el viejo refrigerador de Doña Lucha por uno de nueva tecnología y además parlante, lo cual vuelve loca a Lucha. Maria sorprende a Alberto acaramelado con Gloria y de celos inicia una competencia con Betsabé por un chico guapo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: El regreso de la Licha viviente
programme.desc: La tía Licha regresa de entre los muertos, donde en realidad nunca estuvo. Plácido la corre de la casa, pero la familia se apiada de ella.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Los López reordenan la casa cuando descubren que la tía Licha es su nueva vecina porque heredó el departamento contiguo. Plácido encuentra un nuevo empleo, en el que debe lidiar con una millenial déspota.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico son evaluados por una trabajadora social para verificar si son buenos padres Federica y Ludovico quieren tomar ventaja de que están solos para viajar a Hawai.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico se compromete a llevar a toda la familia al cine, pero las cosas no salen como esperaba y al final ninguno logra disfrutar la película.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco está muy triste porque lo despidieron de su trabajo por culpa de Emilia. Fran se enamora de Silvana, su psicóloga, y termina seduciéndola.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.sub-title: No me importa que me digan mujeriego
programme.desc: Paco regresa con Miranda, su exnovia, y la lleva a vivir a su casa. Todo va bien hasta que llega Lorena y el mundo se le viene abajo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Al derecho y al Derbez cumple 10 años en la televisión. Alz y Heimer regañan a su nieto. Julio Esteban lee una carta muy particular a su público. La cocina de Don Pepe Roni trae diferentes recetas para morirse de la risa.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: La gente le hace preguntas a la licenciada Castañeda. El Súper Portero hace que Mara Patricia Castañeda salga de su programa furiosa debido a sus intervenciones.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Todos los chicos le donan ropa a Sabrina para los niños del hospital, Jack emocionado le dice a Miguel que ya quiere volver a ver a Sabrina, el dinero que recauden es para medicinas de los niños del hospital.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia les cuenta a Celina y Vico que estuvo a punto de entregarse con Miguel pero que Gastón casi los descubre. León sorprende a Diego y sus amigos intentando salir del colegio. Vico tiene dificultades con su padre. Jose sufre al ver a Raquel y Teo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego y Giovanni le dicen a Tomás que Sol lo engaña, pero Sol le dice que sus amigos los quieren separar porque están interesados en ella y Tomás la perdona.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Los alumnos hacen una protesta, pues con el entrenamiento de fútbol no tienen tiempo de estudiar. Roberta propone entrenar los fines de semana y todos se ponen en su contra.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol golpea a Anita porque cree que Tomás la dejó por su culpa. Miguel le dice a Mia que siente que su relación se esta estancando.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Rocco y Mia hablan sobre los problemas de Vico. Tomás se emborracha y besa a la fuerza a la maestra Fátima, Gastón lo descubre y lo reporta. Vico intenta denunciar a su papá sin éxito alguno. Franco invita a Alma y su familia a pasar Navidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco se lesiona y le pide a Alma que lo lleve con el médico. Alma se enfurece con Gandía al saber que fue destituida de su cuerpo de porristas. Martín se anuncia como el tutor del quinto grado.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: María tiene que decirle a Juan Pablo que su papá murió. Finalmente, Cristóbal ve su esfuerzo cuando es elegido como nuevo director del colegio donde trabaja.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Adolfo queda impactado con el cambio de María y por ello le pide Alejandro que rehaga su vida con ella y recupere a su hijo. Vanessa convence a los padres de familia de armar un alboroto en contra de Juan Pablo para cumplir su venganza contra él.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: Alejandro y María tienen una cita pero todo sale mal. Cristóbal va a la fiesta de Sonia y se emborracha.

programme.title: Simplemente María
programme.desc: María teme que Alejandro descubra que Juan Pablo es su hijo y que al saberlo se lo quite. María se enfrenta a Alejandro y le deja en claro que no lo quiere cerca de ella ni de su hijo.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Los agentes de la policía encuentran el bote de veneno con el que mataron a Dante en el cuarto de Pilar. Por su parte, el médico le avisa a Gael que el corazón que tenía no es compatible con el de Gianna.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Fidel le dice a Eloísa que con la autopsia descubrieron que Dante fue envenenado y Pilar es la principal sospechosa. Fiorella le dice a Pedro que cree que está embarazada. Al mismo tiempo, se entera que podría ser hija de Sergio.

programme.title: Muchacha italiana viene a casarse
programme.desc: Federica es detenida por homicidio e intento de asesinato. Eloísa le dice a Gael que no lo quitará del testamento aunque no sea un Ángeles.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma
programme.desc: José José muestra la realidad de la vida de una estrella y cómo la fama, el dinero, y los placeres pueden destruirlo.

programme.title: Uno y medio contra el mundo
programme.desc: En una agradable amistad entre un hombre despreocupado y un muchachito, surge una extraña sorpresa.

programme.title: Chanoc
programme.desc: Chanoc vuelve a arriesgar una vez más su vida, en un mar repleto de tiburones para combatir a grupo de contrabandistas.

programme.title: Mamá, soy Paquito
programme.desc: Paquito sufre la muerte de su madre a temprana edad, quedando a merced de la pobreza y la miseria.

programme.title: Paraíso robado
programme.desc: Una joven pierde la razón cuando se entera de que su tío y su novio murieron en un accidente de tren.

programme.title: Muñecos infernales
programme.desc: Tres jóvenes roban un ídolo en Haití que encierra una maldición. Luego, se lo muestran a unos especialistas en ciencias ocultas que ya conocen la historia del objeto y los secretos que esconde.

programme.title: Amor Y Pecado
programme.desc: El dramático encuentro entre dos hermanos que se enamoran de la misma mujer, quien los rescató de un orfanatorio.

programme.title: Después de la tormenta
programme.desc: Dos hermanos gemelos dirigen un faro, pero uno está enamorado de la mujer del otro. Un día, los hermanos salen a pescar y solo uno de ellos regresa para, después, suplantar la identidad del hermano desaparecido.

programme.title: Paraíso robado
programme.desc: Una joven pierde la razón cuando se entera de que su tío y su novio murieron en un accidente de tren.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Predicar con el ejemplo es el mejor argumento
programme.desc: Los padres de Sofía la sobreprotegen y simulan ser intachables, pero ella descubrirá su doble moral después de quedar embarazada.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: The Flathead V-8 in this barn find Ford F1 pickup is FILLED with oil sludge. Can Davin and Jeff get it cleaned out enough to get this beauty of a farm truck running again? BONUS FEATURE AT THE END! Watch an incredible time-lapse rebuild of a flathead Ford V8 engine!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: BIG NEWS: This is the first video in a five-part series featuring a DeTomaso Pantera, a collaboration between "Redline Rebuild" and "Barn Find Hunter". On "Barn Find Hunter," we always uncover cars that have been hidden for years and delve into their fascinating stories. Typically, we are involved in the initial phase of the barn find story, step one. Rarely do we have the privilege of witnessing steps two and three: the exchange of ownership and the restoration. Today is that special day! Tom's son, Brian, has purchased a DeTomaso Pantera that has been frozen in time for nearly 40 years. The Pantera gets loaded onto a flatbed and taken back to the shop for a thorough assessment of its condition, with plans to get the engine running and potentially turn it into our next Redline Rebuild project. Stay tuned for more videos from the Redline Rebuild Team!

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom travels to Michigan to visit Mick, a previous guest on our 'Will it Run' series with Davin Reckow. Mick has a massive collection of Chrysler 'Hemi' cars, rare one-off models, and some celebrity-owned vehicles, specifically, 'The Fonz's' motorcycle.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Rob Ida's custom car shop, where he checks out his barn-find projects and gets an EXCLUSIVE tour of his one-of-a-kind shop. The best way to explain Rob's shop is not only by calling it a car shop but also an innovation factory. Using the latest technology in metal CNC stretching, 3D printing, and electronic accessories, Rob and his team are setting a new standard for what it means to build custom cars. Follow along as he shows us the latest projects and technology the engineering world has to offer.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: While in St. George, Utah, Tom learns of a junkyard with hundreds of solid old cars, where the owner never sold anything and never allowed anyone inside. Tom makes a few phone calls and sweet-talks his way into Blake's Auto Salvage.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom teams up with his friend Rob Ida to continue the search for cars in New York City. After visiting a few locations, he follows a lead on a late '30s LaSalle, a key piece in a massive collection and one of the best discoveries on the show. Rarely do we come across barn finds in perfect condition that aren't too rusted, yet only need minimal work to get them running. Welcome to this extraordinary collection – 40 barn finds featuring various makes and models, each waiting to be discovered and find new homes.

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: This Dodge Challenger was parked in the early '90s and hasn't been touched since. Can Davin bring it back to its former glory and get it running and driving again?

programme.title: Will It Run?
programme.desc: Last time we got this iconic 1970 Dodge Challenger TA 340 Six Pack running, but we weren't satisfied with just that. We wanted to see it back on the road again too. (We also wanted to give it a good detailing!)

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom visits Cliff who has a great collection of cars but Tom's main interest is with Cliff's son's 1957 Austin A35. The 1957 Austin A35 was restored by an anonymous person as part of a charity program.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: From his starting point in Midland, Texas, Tom and the Ford wagon cover solid ground and make it to Lubbock, Texas before a grouping of cars held captive behind a chain-link fence capture his attention.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom heads to Great Britain in search of some exotic barn finds and has some great luck at his first location where he discovers a Mercedes-Benz 500SEC AMG and a Jaguar XJS TWR.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: Tom forgoes driving his 1939 Ford Woody Wagon in favor of another car that he's owned for years: his Fern Mist 1953 Ford Ranch Wagon.

programme.title: What's For Sale?
programme.desc: With $600,000 to spend, cottage lovers Donny and Dora dream of a Muskoka cabin to keep their twin boys connected to the family into their teenage years. programme.title: What's For Sale? With A View

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Joey is welcomed to Sao Paulo with a freshly brewed cup of excellence at The Coffee Lab in the trendy Madalena district. Joey checks out big coffee exporting in the Port of Santos with shipping containers stacked like legos, Jaco bird coffee (foraged from bird poop), and the world's largest savannah grassland, where Daterra Coffee Farms researches small-lot coffees on a massive scale.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: Following an excursion to the extremely remote Gnobe Bugle Village, Joey Jeep-treks the terrain from the top of Volcan Baru. The search for coffee known to cost $1,000 per pound leads Joey to the eclectic town of Boquete, a plunge-worthy volcanic river-filled-crevasse, and awe-inspiring Gesha coffee farms with more rainbows and hummingbirds than one could possibly imagine.

programme.title: Gemma's Bigger Bolder Baking 10th Anniversary Special

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: “There's nothing as good as a good piece of meat”, and as Julia is quick to point out, there is less and less really good (well marbled and aged) beef to be found. Hangar Steak, Skirt Strip, Flank and Ribeye.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques and Julia create some very special desserts in this colorful episode. Poires Belle Helene - poached pear perched atop pound cake drizzled with chocolate sauce sweet creamy rich and delicious Strawberries Sabayon and Crepes Suzette, classically flambéed and served with orange butter and powdered sugar, as well as a Hungarian inspired torta of layered crepes baked with raspberry jam.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques dressed in a toga? For the Julia's Caesar Salad, of course! This show has a salad for everyone, from a simple mixed green salad with a garlic vinaigrette, to classic Caesar and Nicoise (with fresh seared tuna) Salads. How about some Potato Salad? Well, Julia and Jacques prepare two: an American style potato salad with home made mayonnaise, and its tart French cousin.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: As a child, one of Julia's favorite sandwiches was an ice cream sandwich. Jacques was a stick of chocolate between two pieces of bread. Today, Julia's favorite is the Croque Monsieur, or pressed and baked ham & cheese. Of course, Jacques provides a variation he calls a Croque Madam. A close second they can both agree on is the New England lobster roll, served on a toasted hot dog bun.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Julia and Jacques prepare artichokes—several ways—including artichoke hearts stuffed with spinach and mushroom Duxelle. Julia demonstrates her secret to ever-green cooked string beans and butter bruised peas. Jacques counters with his aromatic Tomato Provencal.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara travels to Juneau to learn how locals are turning wild and foraged food to become culinary entrepreneurs. She talks to a fish biologist about wild salmon and learns the traditional way to make Cedar Planked Salmon with an Alaska Native home cook. On the side, foraged sea asparagus. Back home Sara shows us an easy way to make any fish with her Salmon in a bag with Borscht Beets.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Chinese immigrants were the backbone of Vancouver where Sara takes a culinary tour of its Chinatown. She learns to make two appetizers cooked with tea and samples Dim Sum. Then local Judy Lam Maxwell shows her a Chinese dumpling mashup filled with Korean Bulgogi. Back home, Sara quickly whips up some Baby Egg Rolls with Soy dipping sauce.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Who doesn't love Italian food? Sara's got some of your favorites made with just a little twist. Like delicious ravioli made with won ton skins to save time, or Lasagna made with Polenta rather than noodles. Her homemade pizza dough is super simple. For a show stopper, try her Butternut Squash Farrotto, just like risotto but with the ancient grain farro. On top, delicious fried sage.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Spot Prawns are so beloved in Vancouver. Sara learns fascinating facts about the critters from a local commercial fisherman, then joins a Vancouver home cook to prepare a Spot Prawn Risotto. Prawns are also on the menu in Miami where a Cuban grandmother shows Sara her recipe for Camarones Enchilados after a spirited food tour of the city's legendary Calle Ocho neighborhood.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's viewers love 5 ingredient recipes, so why not six? Her frittata has a secret ingredient – leftover spaghetti – with rich Brie and Bacon. You could save the spaghetti from another pasta favorite – Peppery Broccoli Pasta with Feta. Her Duck confit with Braised leeks and sauerkraut is nice enough for company. Plus, Sara answers a viewer's question about perfectly flattened chicken breasts.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue, betrayal, and drunk girls fighting each other. Then, a high-class croquet party gets interrupted when Matt and Lou come through to repossess a Volkswagen And finally, it's a trip to a parking garage to repossess a stolen limo - with a gaggle of partiers in the back. Will Matt and Sonia be able to hook and book, or will they wind up at each others' throats?

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge, but not if his girlfriend has anything to say about it. Then, Lyndah & Sonia respond to a tip and sabotage a paparazzo's big shot by hooking his car. And finally, Lou and Matt have to take a van from an amateur marching band with a terrible secret.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle. Then, Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in an uncomfortable situation when they barge in on a couple engaging in some risqué role-playing. And finally, Lou & Matt hit the ice and a bunch of irate hockey players in an effort to repossess a Zamboni

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches. Then, Matt and Lou face a dilemma when they realize their target vehicle is filled with angry bees. And, Sonia and Froy hit the airwaves to reclaim a truck that's being used in a radio broadcast stunt.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: First, Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant. Then, Sonia and Lyndah head to a yard sale to get a vehicle away from the car's owner and her out-of-control friend. And finally, the whole team hits the beach in an effort to get a truck-load of ATV's away from a gang of knife-wielding beach bums.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a bad part of town to find that their target car is owned by bat-equipped gang bangers. Then, a seemingly friendly teacher and an assistant principal nearly come to blows when Froy and Sonia come around to repossess one of their vehicles Then, And finally, after the tow truck breaks down on the side of the road, Lou, Matt, and Froy are left with no options and stuck in the middle of a violent dispute between some gun-wielding neighbors.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou get the shock a lifetime when they repossess a car from an irate doctor whom they know all too well from an earlier incident. This time he's twice as angry, and he's dead-set against giving up his car again. Then, Sonia, Matt, and Lyndah go undercover as college students to extract an extremely expensive bicycle from an extremely irate athlete. And finally, Lou and Froy head to church to repossess a van from a minister with a terrible problem.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy transform their search for a small dirt bike into a quasi-reality show, getting a group of young smart-asses trapped into their own web. Then, Sonia and Matt head to the business district for a different sort of quarry - a high-end luxury tanning bed owned by a less-than-sympathetic German. And finally, Lou and Matt set up a high stakes sting operation to bust a shady tow-truck driver, but will their best-laid plans go up in smoke?

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Sheila E, Theo Rossi, Little Yellow Book Tea Time

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Savannah Guthrie, Moody Foody, Miles Music Kid

programme.sub-title: Heather Locklear, Small Business Big Giveaway with Barbara Corcoran, Drew's News
programme.desc: Actress Heather Locklear stops by to chat about her new movie “Don't Sweat The Small Stuff: The Kristine Carlson Story.” Then, “Shark Tank's” Barbara Corcoran stops by to surprise one small business owner with a very big giveaway. 45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Rigged: The Voter Suppression Playbook
programme.desc: Narrated by Jeffrey Wright, Rigged chronicles how our right to vote is being undercut by a decade of dirty tricks – including the partisan use of gerrymandering and voter purges, and the gutting of the Voting Rights Act by the Supreme Court. The film captures real-time voter purges in North Carolina and voter intimidation in Texas. Directed by Michael Kasino.

programme.title: The Brink
programme.desc: THE BRINK follows Steve Bannon for a year leading up to the 2018 mid-term elections in the United States, shedding light on his efforts to mobilize and unify far-right parties in order to win seats in the May 2019 European Parliamentary elections. To maintain his power and influence, the former Goldman Sachs banker and media investor reinvents himself — as he has many times before — this time as the self-appointed leader of a global populist movement. A keen manipulator of the press and gifted self-promoter, Bannon continues to draw headlines and protests wherever he goes, feeding the powerful myth on which his survival relies. Directed by Alison Klayman.

Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.
